chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1781 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections. 2.For hearing of main case 15-02-2024 Mr. Sabir Hussain Samo, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Hassan Changez, DAO, Naushehro Feroze (respondent No.7). ***** Respondent No.7 is present and submits that the case of the petitioner for pensionery benefits is ripe. The petitioner has to appear before the Additional District Accounts Officer, Naushahro Feroze for completion of his pension record and authorization of pension. Petitioner is present and submits that he will visit the office tomorrow. Respondent No.7 undertakes that as soon as petitioner visits the office and fulfills the formalities, the pension would be released to him in accordance with law. The petition having served its purpose is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
